---
title: "Exploring Finite Automata"
description: "Computing with limited resources"
date: 2025-10-27
layout: full
toc: true
toc-expand: 3
---

## Activities

- {{< iconify fa6-solid lightbulb size=18px >}} **Reading Assignment**:
  - Chapter nine of [What Can be Computed? A Practical Guide to the
  Theory of Computation](https://whatcanbecomputed.com/)
- {{< iconify fa6-solid lightbulb size=18px >}} **Monday**:
  - Presentation teams finalize GitHub pull request for presentation by 11:59 PM
  - All presentation slides must be built with Quarto and RevealJS
  - All students in a presentation team must contribute to the pull request
- {{< iconify fa6-solid people-line size=18px >}} **Tuesday**:
  - Instructor's presentation on this week's assigned topics
  - Teams complete their final practice steps for their proofgrammer presentations
- {{< iconify fa6-solid gears size=18px >}} **Tuesday Laboratory**:
  - **Module Two Proofgrammer Presentations and Evaluations**
  - Teams and presentation topics assigned at the start of the week
  - Student teams present and evaluate each other's work
- {{< iconify fa6-solid people-line size=18px >}} **Thursday**:
  - Instructor's presentation on this week's assigned topics
  - Charette session where students collaboratively ask and answer questions

## Slides

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" src="../../slides/weekten/"></iframe>
```

{{< iconify majesticons presentation-play size=18px >}} Full Screen: [Week
Ten: Finite State Automata](../../slides/weekten/)
